/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation  -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,-rpath,'$ORIGIN/../../private' -shared -Wl,-soname,routertestplugin_bad_two.so -o ../../../../../plugin_output_directory/routertestplugin_bad_two.so CMakeFiles/routertestplugin_bad_two.dir/bad_two.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/tmp/mysql/cmake-build-mysql-docker/library_output_directory ../../../../../library_output_directory/libmysqlharness.so.1 -ldl ../../../../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../../../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../../../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../../../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../../../../archive_output_directory/libmytime.a ../../../../../archive_output_directory/libzlib.a ../../../../../archive_output_directory/libzstd.a -lm /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../../../../../archive_output_directory/libbacktrace.a
